description: Green and grey backpackOne haul loop on the top, two padded and adjustable shoulder strapsHas an adjustable waist strap, secured with a click claspOne main zip compartment with a padded laptop sleeveOne external zip pocket on the front with an organiser sleeve and a slip pocketDual compression straps on either sideA mesh stash pocket on either sidesPadded and panelled mesh backWater-resistantPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 5 years from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
